metadata.source: Derived from train-00000-of-00001.parquet plus paper seed pairs.
metadata.auto_apply_policy: Use high_confidence_pairs only. Review and ambiguous pairs are prompt/model references only.
notes: Protected tokens should never be normalized by MFR.
Context-sensitive tokens should be routed to target-only prompt/model fallback.
Validation for tr/trde is not available in the provided validation split; internal dev diagnostics use a deterministic 90/10 train split.
